description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with one leg slightly forward as if in mid-step. The figure is dressed in casual attire, including a short-sleeved top and long pants, and is wearing athletic shoes. The head is proportionate and features short hair, while the arms hang naturally at the sides. The overall form is elongated, with some visible distortions and stretching, particularly in the upper body and limbs, which appear unnaturally extended. The surface texture is matte and the clothing appears to be made of fabric, while the shoes have a more structured appearance. The figure is not carrying any visible objects or accessories.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian in a walking pose, with short hair and athletic shoes, featuring elongated and distorted limbs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, torso, and one leg stepping forward, with arms at the sides and visible stretching in the upper body.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the elongated back and leg, with the head turned slightly and the foot extended backward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and both legs, with the right leg extended behind and visible shoe details.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the lower body and foot, with the leg and shoe appearing stretched and the upper body partially obscured.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved top and long pants
